headline: PepsiCo Drops Sponsorship of U.K. Music Fest Headlined by Kanye West
summary: The rapper, who has tried to move beyond his controversial past, is to perform during all three days of Wireless Festival in London.

headline: Is the Pepsico Turnaround Story Finally Worth Buying?
summary: Consumer staples stocks have delivered steady but unspectacular results while the broader market chased AI-fueled gains. PepsiCo (NASDAQ:PEP) spent 2025 navigating volume softness, pricing pushback, and one-time charges that masked underlying progress. The beverage giant delivered full-year net revenue of $93.9 billion, up 2.3% on a GAAP and 1.7% organically. Net income fell 14% to ... Is the Pepsico Turnaround Story Finally Worth Buying?

headline: Here’s why you shouldn’t add risk to your portfolio, according to BCA
summary: Investing.com -- Global financial markets are standing at a precarious crossroads as the persistent energy shock from the Middle East begins to outweigh inflation concerns, according to a quarterly outlook from BCA Research.
